options.name: -a
options.description: Specify the application to use for opening the file

options.name: -b
options.description: Specify the bundle identifier of the app to use to open the file

options.name: -D
options.description: Reveals the enclosing folder in finder

options.name: -t
options.description: Open the file with the default text editor

options.name: -f
options.description: Read input from standard input and open the results in the default text editor

options.name: -F
options.description: Opens the application without restoring windows

options.name: -R
options.description: Reveals the file(s) in the Finder instead of opening them

options.name: -n
options.description: Open a new instance of the application(s) even if one is already running

options.name: -g
options.description: Do not bring the application to the foreground

options.name: -h
options.description: Searches header locations for a header whose name matches the given string and then opens it

options.name: --args
options.description: All remaining arguments are passed to the opened application in the argv parameter to main().  These arguments are not opened or interpreted by the open tool
